title: IoT Architecture & Concepts Quiz
description: Advanced MCQs covering 5-layer architecture, DIKW model, Big Data Vs, and IoT constraints.
heading: Concept of IoT & Architecture Practice

questions.question: In the 5-layer IoT architecture, which layer handles protocol translation and data filtering?
Which architectural view focuses on logical decomposition of system components?
In XaaS model, what is the major transformation?
What is the purpose of Industrial Internet Reference Architecture (IIRA)?
Which layer of IoT architecture interacts with physical devices?
Which component acts as an intermediary between sensors and cloud?
Which of the following is NOT a core IoT layer?
Which analytics level answers “What will happen?”
Which analytics level answers “What should we do?”
Which visualization is best for time-based data?
Which visualization is best for location-based data?
Which of the following is a key feature of IoT gateways?
What does DIKW stand for?
Which is NOT one of the 5 V’s of Big Data?
Which IoT constraint relates to environmental conditions?
Which constraint increases impact due to large-scale deployment?
What is the “battery barrier” in IoT?
Which principle ensures security is integrated from beginning?
Which IoT layer is responsible for delivering services to users?
Which control paradigm involves automatic decision-making?
